subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Most Great Scene! The effulgent rays of the All-Merciful Lord of humanity have illumined the horizon of the world with infinite bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بمنظر اکبر تجلیات رحمانیه رب بشر افق عالم را بفیض نامتناهی منور و
subcodes.subjects: @differences in human capacity, @the Adamic cycle and the Baha'i cycle, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @education and the development of capacity
